{{Quote|There isn't much in the data banks about the Helska system. There's not an easily inhabitable planet among the seven, and no one's taken the time or trouble to build one up. None of them even have names—just Helska 1 to 7.|[[Garth Breise]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime">''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''</ref>}}
'''Helska 2''' was the second planet in the [[Helska system/Legends|Helska system]].
